description_long: This object is a compact dumbbell featuring a straight, cylindrical handle in a reddish-brown color, connecting two sets of black, circular weight plates on either end. The handle appears smooth and is slightly thinner than the diameter of the weight plates, providing a comfortable grip. Each end of the dumbbell is capped with a series of stacked, round plates, giving it a balanced and symmetrical appearance. The weight plates are matte black, with no visible markings, logos, or text. The overall design is minimalistic and functional, suitable for use in gyms, home workout spaces, or urban fitness parks. The dumbbell appears to be in excellent, unused condition, with no visible signs of wear, scratches, or rust.
description: A compact dumbbell with a smooth, reddish-brown cylindrical handle and matte black, round weight plates on each end. The design is minimalistic, balanced, and appears new.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the dumbbell, with both sets of black round plates and the reddish-brown handle clearly visible.
description_view_1: End-on view showing the circular face of the weight plates and the handle's cross-section, emphasizing the dumbbell's symmetry.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, identical to view 0, displaying the dumbbell's length and both sets of plates.
description_view_3: End-on view from the opposite side, mirroring view 1, with the circular plate face and handle end visible.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, cylindrical, round cross-section, smooth surface, no visible ergonomic features.
attribute_end_cap_design: Round, flat-faced black plates with a matte finish, no visible patterns or features.
attribute_condition: Appears new and unused, with no visible wear, scratches, or rust.
